summary: DeepSeek multi-GPU workers should be isolated with CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES and use --device cuda.
On this machine, workers_per_gpu=2 clearly outperformed workers_per_gpu=1 on the native Corpus.ocr path.
Cold-start overhead is significant for DeepSeek OCR v2 due to model load, page rasterization, and sequential per-page inference.

recommended_starting_point.reason: memory, CPU, and utilization heuristics all suggest headroom above 2 workers; 2 already beat 1 decisively.
